new_claims.claim_text: Iran has reported power outages at all its petrochemical facilities in Mahshahr city as a result of today's Israeli airstrikes.
new_claims.notes: Claim of Israeli airstrikes causing power outages in Iran.

new_claims.claim_text: Iran just shot down a US fighter jet today.
new_claims.notes: Claim made in a reply to MarioNawfal, needs verification.

new_claims.claim_text: Donald Trump now has the worst net approval rating among independents of ANY president ever.
